$comment: Velarro Estate — shared component plan. STATUS: BLOCKED. Depends on docs/figma/component-inventory.json, which is empty because the Figma MCP rate limit blocked ingestion on 2026-07-01. Only the repository-side conventions are defined; no component list is invented. The continuation run fills sharedComponents from components observed on 2+ screens.

directoryLayout.components/ui: Design-system primitives (Button, Input, Card, ...) mapped 1:1 to Figma components where possible
directoryLayout.components/layout: Header, Footer, navigation, page shells shared across routes
directoryLayout.components/<module>: Module-specific composites, colocated by module ID from module-queue.json

conventions.naming: PascalCase file and export names; one component per file
conventions.imports: @/components/... via the @/* path alias (tsconfig, Repository verified)
conventions.clientServerSplit: Server Components by default; "use client" only for interactive leaves (menus, carousels, form controls, overlay triggers)
conventions.styling: Tailwind v4 utilities referencing @theme tokens from app/globals.css; no CSS modules or CSS-in-JS
conventions.accessibility: Interactive primitives ship with keyboard support, ARIA where semantics fall short, and focus management for overlay surfaces
conventions.verificationSource: Repository verified (conventions) — component list pending Figma

_sharedComponentSchema.props: string — planned prop surface incl. variants
states: array — hover/focus/disabled/error/loading as evidenced in Figma
